title: Optimized Vanilla Extra (OVE)
description: This modpack optimize Minecraft with a few extras
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db9c40788cac77567eb8203468fdc01fe8c00569.png)

Opitmized Vanilla Extra is modpack that fully optimizes your game. It adds useful mods for building, adventuring, recording videos and much more. If you like playing with your friends, use [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential). It allows multiplayer in normal Minecraft worlds, without ANY risk, REALLY. This is no scam. If you like Minecraft Trailers, this is for you. First, OVE adds [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones). It change ALL blocks to looking like trailers. Second, OVE adds [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), [FA: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension) and [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations). These mods and resource packs makes Minecraft more alive with adding bunch of animations. Do you think Minecraft have lot of advancements. Now, it have over 1000 advancements (only when using [BlazeandCave's](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack)). I hope you like my modpack :D

This modpack is fully optimized with some extra mods like [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers), [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential), [Jorney Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) and [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica).

It adds some useful resource packs and two datapacks. I added some shaders if you like them.

WARNING: [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) is not compatible with [VMP](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) and [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric).



Can you subscribe my YouTube channel (Sorry i'm Finnish)


[Subscribe here](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCcSVmbZDI9a1En45aHizUKQ)
